text.title: Status Report Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the per-week emission record (which template went to whom). Validator enforces before send.

example.note: single_source_verified must be true, CEO mapped to wrong template, CEO line_count > 5, contains_raw_technical true on Leadership/CEO is forbidden.

forbidden.pattern: emissions where audience=Internal Leadership AND contains_raw_technical == true
audience-template pairing mismatched (e.g. CEO with leadership-template)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim trailing whitespace + boilerplate signatures before counting lines.
Substitute stakeholder display name for email when delivered via portal.
